sqlMap.sql: SELECT DISTINCT f.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID , f.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME , f.FILE_PATH AS FILE_PATH , f.FILE_SIZE AS FILE_SIZE , f.TYPE_ID AS TYPE_ID , f.DOWN_COUNT AS DOWN_COUNT , f.FILE_EXT AS FILE_EXT , f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID , f.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS , f.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID , decode ( #primary# , '1' , f.CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2) as CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2 as CREATE_NAME2, f.CREATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE') AS CREATE_DATE, f.UPDATE_ID as UPDATE_ID, f.UPDATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE') AS UPDATE_DATE, f.TENANT_ID as TENANT_ID, type.TYPE_ICON as TYPE_ICON , folder.FOLDER_PATH as FOLDER_PATH, folder.FOLDER_NAME1 as FOLDER_NAME1, NVL2(s.user_id,'1','0') as FAVORITE_STATUS, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT SHARE_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE FOLDERFILE_ID = f.FILE_ID AND FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'F' AND TENANT_ID = f.TENANT_ID) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FILESHARE_STATUS, decode (f.FILE_EXT , 'folder',0,1) as FOLDER_SORT, type.TYPE_NAME AS TYPE_NAME, f.CREATE_ID AS OWNER_ID, NVL2(enc.file_id, 1, 0) as ENCRYPTED, f.DEPTH, f.ROOT_ID, f.PARENT_ID, f.HIERARCHICAL_PATH

union all select DISTINCT folder.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID , decode ( #primary# , '1' , folder.FOLDER_NAME1, folder.FOLDER_NAME2) AS FILE_NAME , folder.FOLDER_PATH AS FILE_PATH , 0 AS FILE_SIZE , 'folder' AS TYPE_ID , 0 AS DOWN_COUNT , 'folder' AS FILE_EXT , folder.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID , folder.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS , folder.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID , decode ( #primary# , '1' , folder.CREATE_NAME1, folder.CREATE_NAME2) as CREATE_NAME1, folder.CREATE_NAME2 as CREATE_NAME2, folder.CREATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE') AS CREATE_DATE, folder.UPDATE_ID , folder.UPDATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE') AS UPDATE_DATE, folder.TENANT_ID as TENANT_ID , type.TYPE_ICON AS TYPE_ICON , folder.FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH , folder.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1 , NVL2(s.user_id,'1','0') as FAVORITE_STATUS, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT SHARE_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE WHERE FOLDERFILE_ID = folder.FOLDER_ID AND FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'D' AND TENANT_ID = folder.TENANT_ID) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FILESHARE_STATUS, decode (FILE_EXT , 'folder',0,1) as FOLDER_SORT, type.TYPE_NAME AS TYPE_NAME, folder.OWNER_ID AS OWNER_ID, 0 as ENCRYPTED, 1 as DEPTH, TO_CHAR(folder.FOLDER_ID) as ROOT_ID, TO_CHAR(folder.FOLDER_ID) as PARENT_ID, TO_CHAR(folder.FOLDER_ID) as HIERARCHICAL_PATH

sql.isNotEqual: (LOWER(t.CREATE_NAME1) LIKE LOWER('%' || #searchCreateName# || '%') ESCAPE '\' or LOWER(t.CREATE_NAME2) LIKE LOWER('%' || #searchCreateName# || '%') ESCAPE '\')

sqlMap.sql:
select folder_id, tenant_id from tbl_webfolder_folderuser where tenant_id = #tenantId# and USER_ID in
#idList[].id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(OWNER_ID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE OWNER_ID = #ownerId# AND FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# AND FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER ( FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) SELECT SEQ_FOLDERID.NEXTVAL, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, #folderType#, '|' || #id# || '|', 0, 0, 'root', 'Y', #ownerId#, #userId#, TO_DATE(#timeUTC#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #createName1#, #createName2#, #userId#, TO_DATE(#timeUTC#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #compId#, #tenantId#
FROM TBL_USERMASTER
FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER
WHERE CN = #ownerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT SEQ_FOLDERID.currval as newFolderId FROM dual
sqlMap.select:
SELECT FOLDER_ID as id, CASE WHEN FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' THEN '##' ELSE FOLDER_UPPER END PARENT, CASE WHEN FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END SELECTED, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN FOLDER_NAME1 ELSE FOLDER_NAME2 END TEXT, CREATE_ID AS CREATEID, FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDERNAME1, FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDERNAME2, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDERLEVEL, FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDERPATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_TYPE = 'U' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND OWNER_ID = #userId#
AND USE_STATUS = 'Y'
ORDER BY SELECTED DESC, FOLDERNAME1

SELECT FOLDER_ID AS ID, CASE WHEN FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' THEN '##' ELSE FOLDER_UPPER END PARENT, CASE WHEN FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END SELECTED, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN FOLDER_NAME1 ELSE FOLDER_NAME2 END TEXT, CREATE_ID AS CREATEID, FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDERNAME1, FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDERNAME2, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDERLEVEL, FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDERPATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND FOLDER_TYPE = 'D' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #compId# AND OWNER_ID IN
#idList[]#
ORDER BY SELECTED DESC , FOLDERNAME1

SELECT DISTINCT F.FOLDER_ID AS ID, CASE WHEN F.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' THEN '##' ELSE FOLDER_UPPER END PARENT, CASE WHEN F.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END SELECTED, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN F.FOLDER_NAME1 ELSE F.FOLDER_NAME2 END TEXT, F.CREATE_ID AS CREATEID, F.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDERNAME1, F.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDERNAME2 , F.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDERLEVEL, F.FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDERPATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU ON F.FOLDER_ID = FU.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = FU.TENANT_ID AND F.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' WHERE F.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND F.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND F.COMPANY_ID IN
#idList[]#
AND ( ( FU.USER_ID IN
#idList[]#
) $managerFolderStr$ )
UNION SELECT FOLDER_ID AS ID, '##' AS PARENT, 1 AS SELECTED, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN FOLDER_NAME1 ELSE FOLDER_NAME2 END TEXT, CREATE_ID AS CREATEID, FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDERNAME1, FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDERNAME2, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDERLEVEL, FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDERPATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE COMPANY_ID IN
#idList[]#
AND FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY SELECTED DESC , FOLDERLEVEL, FOLDERNAME1

select * from ( select pchk.*, ROWNUM rownums from ( select * from (
from tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_id = #folderId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# ) folder on folder.folder_id = f.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = #tenantId# left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' left join tbl_webfolder_encrypted_file enc on enc.file_id = f.file_id and enc.tenant_id = f.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
from tbl_webfolder_filetype type LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_webfolder_folder folder ON type.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on folder.folder_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='D' where folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.folder_upper = #folderId# and folder.company_id IN
#idList[].id#
) t where 1=1
(TO_CHAR(t.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #searchStartDate# AND TO_CHAR(t.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #searchEndDate#)
t.TYPE_NAME LIKE ('%' || #searchFileType# || '%')
ORDER BY FOLDER_SORT, CASE WHEN FOLDER_SORT = 0 THEN FILE_NAME END, ROOT_ID DESC, HIERARCHICAL_PATH ) pchk where ROWNUM <= #pEnd# + #pStart# ) where rownums >= #pStart# + 1

select * from ( select pchk.*, ROWNUM rownums from ( select * from (
from tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_id = #folderId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# ) folder on folder.folder_id = f.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = #tenantId# left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' left join tbl_webfolder_encrypted_file enc on enc.file_id = f.file_id and enc.tenant_id = f.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
from tbl_webfolder_filetype type LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_webfolder_folder folder ON type.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on folder.folder_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='D' left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser u on folder.folder_id = u.folder_id where folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.folder_upper = #folderId# and folder.company_id IN
#idList[].id#
AND ( u.user_id IN
#idListUpgrade[]#
OR ( U.SUBDEPT_PERMITTED = 1 AND #userDeptList[]# IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%',U.USER_ID),'%') AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = U.COMPANY_ID AND TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID) )
)
) t where 1=1
(TO_CHAR(t.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #searchStartDate# AND TO_CHAR(t.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #searchEndDate#)
t.TYPE_NAME LIKE ('%' || #searchFileType# || '%')
ORDER BY FOLDER_SORT $orderByData$ ) pchk where ROWNUM <= #pEnd# + #pStart# ) where rownums >= #pStart# + 1

select * from ( select pchk.*, ROWNUM rownums from (
FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f ON folder.FOLDER_ID = f.FOLDER_ID AND folder.TENANT_ID = f.TENANT_ID JOIN ( SELECT FF.FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU ON FF.FOLDER_ID = FU.FOLDER_ID AND FF.TENANT_ID = FU.TENANT_ID AND FF.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND FU.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
WHERE FF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) FP or folder.folder_id = #folderId# ON folder.FOLDER_PATH LIKE FP.FOLDER_PATH || '%' JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID AND type.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' left join tbl_webfolder_encrypted_file enc on enc.file_id = f.file_id and enc.tenant_id = f.tenant_id WHERE f.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
FROM tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like (#folderPath# || '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# and USE_STATUS = 'Y') folder on f.folder_id = folder.folder_id and folder.tenant_id = f.tenant_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' left join tbl_webfolder_encrypted_file enc on enc.file_id = f.file_id and enc.tenant_id = f.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
(TO_CHAR(f.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #searchStartDate# AND TO_CHAR(f.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #searchEndDate#)
type.TYPE_NAME LIKE ('%' || #searchFileType# || '%')
ORDER BY FOLDER_SORT, CASE WHEN FOLDER_SORT = 0 THEN FILE_NAME END, ROOT_ID DESC, HIERARCHICAL_PATH ) pchk where ROWNUM <= #pEnd# + #pStart# ) where rownums >= #pStart# + 1

select * from ( select pchk.*, ROWNUM rownums from ( SELECT DISTINCT t.* from (
from tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like (#folderPath#||'%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# ) folder on folder.folder_id = f.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' left join tbl_webfolder_favor left join tbl_webfolder_encrypted_file enc on enc.file_id = f.file_id and enc.tenant_id = f.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
from tbl_webfolder_filetype type inner JOIN tbl_webfolder_folder folder ON type.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' and folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on folder.folder_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='D' where folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and type.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.company_id = #comId# and folder_path <> #folderPath#
) t where folder_path like (#folderPath#||'%')
ORDER BY FOLDER_SORT, CASE WHEN FOLDER_SORT = 0 THEN FILE_NAME END, ROOT_ID DESC, HIERARCHICAL_PATH ) pchk where ROWNUM <= #pEnd# + #pStart# ) where rownums >= #pStart# + 1

select * from ( select pchk.*, ROWNUM rownums from ( SELECT DISTINCT t.* from (
from tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like (#folderPath#||'%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# ) folder on folder.folder_id = f.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' left join tbl_webfolder_encrypted_file enc on enc.file_id = f.file_id and enc.tenant_id = f.tenant_id
inner join tbl_webfolder_fileuser u on u.FILE_ID = f.FILE_ID where u.user_id IN
#idListUpgrade[]#
AND
WHERE
f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
from tbl_webfolder_filetype type inner JOIN tbl_webfolder_folder folder ON type.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' and folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on folder.folder_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='D'
inner join tbl_webfolder_folderuser u on folder.folder_id = u.folder_id WHERE u.user_id IN
#idListUpgrade[]#
AND
where
folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and type.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.company_id IN
#idList[].id#
and folder_path <> #folderPath#
) t where folder_path like (#folderPath#||'%')
ORDER BY FOLDER_SORT $orderByData$ ) pchk where ROWNUM <= #pEnd# + #pStart# ) where rownums >= #pStart# + 1

select * from ( select pchk.*, ROWNUM rownums from ( SELECT DISTINCT t.* from (
FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f ON folder.FOLDER_ID = f.FOLDER_ID AND folder.TENANT_ID = f.TENANT_ID JOIN ( SELECT FF.FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU ON FF.FOLDER_ID = FU.FOLDER_ID AND FF.TENANT_ID = FU.TENANT_ID AND FF.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND FF.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FU.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
WHERE FF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) FP ON folder.FOLDER_PATH LIKE FP.FOLDER_PATH || '%' or folder.folder_id = #folderId# JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID AND type.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' left join tbl_webfolder_encrypted_file enc on enc.file_id = f.file_id and enc.tenant_id = f.tenant_id WHERE f.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
FROM tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like (#folderPath# || '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# and use_status = 'Y' ) folder on f.folder_id = folder.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id left outer join tbl_webfolder_favor s on f.file_id = s.target_id and s.user_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.target_type ='F' left join tbl_webfolder_encrypted_file enc on enc.file_id = f.file_id and enc.tenant_id = f.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
) t
where folder_path like (#folderPath#||'%')
ORDER BY FOLDER_SORT,CREATE_DATE desc, FILE_ID ) pchk where ROWNUM <= #pEnd# + #pStart# ) where rownums >= #pStart# + 1

select.isNotEqual:
SELECT count(folder.folder_id) as cnt from tbl_webfolder_filetype type inner JOIN tbl_webfolder_folder folder ON type.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' where folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.company_id = #comId# and type.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_path <> #folderPath#
folder.folder_path like ('%'||#folderPath#||'%')
folder.folder_upper = #folderId#
type.FILE_EXT LIKE '%'|| #searchExt# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
(folder.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE '%' || #searchCreateName# || '%' ESCAPE '\' or folder.CREATE_NAME2 LIKE '%' || #searchCreateName# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
type.TYPE_NAME LIKE ('%'|| #searchFileType#||'%')
(folder.folder_name1 LIKE '%' || #searchFileName# || '%' ESCAPE '\' or folder.folder_name2 LIKE '%' || #searchFileName# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
(TO_CHAR(folder.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #searchStartDate# AND TO_CHAR(folder.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #searchEndDate#)
select.isEqual: select TO_NUMBER(0) as cnt from dual

sqlMap.select:
SELECT count(distinct folder.folder_id) as cnt from tbl_webfolder_filetype type inner JOIN tbl_webfolder_folder folder ON type.TYPE_NAME = 'folder' left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser u on folder.folder_id = u.folder_id where folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.company_id IN
#idList[].id#
and type.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_path <> #folderPath#
AND ( u.user_id IN
#idListUpgrade[]#
)
AND ( u.user_id IN
#idListUpgrade[]#
)
folder.folder_path like ('%'||#folderPath#||'%')
folder.folder_upper = #folderId#
type.FILE_EXT LIKE '%'|| #searchExt# || '%' ESCAPE '\'
(folder.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE '%' || #searchCreateName# || '%' ESCAPE '\' or folder.CREATE_NAME2 LIKE '%' || #searchCreateName# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
type.TYPE_NAME LIKE ('%'|| #searchFileType#||'%')
(folder.folder_name1 LIKE '%' || #searchFileName# || '%' ESCAPE '\')
(TO_CHAR(folder.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #searchStartDate# AND TO_CHAR(folder.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #searchEndDate#)

SELECT distinct count(*) from ( SELECT DISTINCT folder.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1, f.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, f.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME, f.FILE_EXT AS FILE_EXT, f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, f.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, decode ( #primary# , '1' , f.CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2) as CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2 as CREATE_NAME2, f.CREATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE') AS CREATE_DATE, f.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, type.TYPE_NAME AS TYPE_NAME from tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like (#folderPath#||'%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# and use_status = 'Y' ) folder on folder.folder_id = f.folder_id
inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id
inner join tbl_webfolder_fileuser u on u.file_id = f.file_id WHERE u.user_id IN
#idListUpgrade[]#
AND
WHERE
f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
) t where 1=1

SELECT distinct count(*) from ( SELECT DISTINCT folder.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1, f.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, f.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME, f.FILE_EXT AS FILE_EXT, f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, f.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, decode ( #primary# , '1' , f.CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2) AS CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, f.CREATE_DATE + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE') AS CREATE_DATE, f.TENANT_ID , type.TYPE_NAME AS TYPE_NAME
FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f ON folder.FOLDER_ID = f.FOLDER_ID AND folder.TENANT_ID = f.TENANT_ID JOIN ( SELECT FF.FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU ON FF.FOLDER_ID = FU.FOLDER_ID AND FF.TENANT_ID = FU.TENANT_ID AND FF.USE_STATUS='Y' AND FF.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FU.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
WHERE FF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) FP ON folder.FOLDER_PATH LIKE FP.FOLDER_PATH || '%' or folder.folder_id = #folderId# JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID AND type.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# WHERE f.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
FROM tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like (#folderPath#||'%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# ) folder on f.folder_id = folder.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
) t where 1=1

select count(*) from ( SELECT f.file_id from tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_id = #folderId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and use_status='Y' ) t on t.folder_id = f.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
type.TYPE_NAME LIKE ('%'|| #searchFileType#||'%')
(TO_CHAR(f.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= #searchStartDate# AND TO_CHAR(f.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') <= #searchEndDate#)
) totalCount

select count(*) from ( SELECT distinct file_id
FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f ON folder.FOLDER_ID = f.FOLDER_ID AND folder.TENANT_ID = f.TENANT_ID JOIN ( SELECT FF.FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER FU ON FF.FOLDER_ID = FU.FOLDER_ID AND FF.TENANT_ID = FU.TENANT_ID AND FF.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FU.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
WHERE FF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and use_status='Y' ) FP ON folder.FOLDER_PATH LIKE FP.FOLDER_PATH || '%' or folder.folder_id = #folderId# JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID AND type.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# WHERE F.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND F.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
FROM tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like (#folderPath# || '%') and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = #folderType# and use_status='Y') t on f.folder_id = t.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype type ON type.TYPE_ID = f.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = f.tenant_id where f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
type.TYPE_NAME LIKE ('%' || #searchFileType# || '%')
(TO_CHAR(f.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= #searchStartDate# AND TO_CHAR(f.CREATE_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') <= #searchEndDate#)
)totalCount
SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and FOLDER_ID = #folderId#

SELECT cn, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #comId# and CN = #userId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_webfolder_folder set folder_path = CASE WHEN FOLDER_LEVEL = 0 THEN '|' || #newFolderId# || '|' ELSE (select folder_path || #newFolderId# || '|' from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_id = #folderUpper# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) end where folder_id = #newFolderId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER( FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES( SEQ_FOLDERID.NEXTVAL, #folderName1#, #folderName2#, #folderType#, #folderPath#||#id#||'|', #folderStep#, #folderLevel#, #folderUppId#, 'Y', #ownerId#, #userId#, TO_DATE(#timeUTC#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #createName1#, #createName2#, #userId#, TO_DATE(#timeUTC#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #comId#, #tenantId# )
SELECT SEQ_FOLDERID.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
sqlMap.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(NVL(MAX(to_number(FOLDER_ID)), 0) + 1) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_UPPER = #folderUppId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select DEPTID as cn from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER SET UPDATE_DATE = TO_DATE(#timeUTC#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), FOLDER_NAME1 = #newFolderName1#, FOLDER_NAME2 = #newFolderName2# WHERE folder_id = #folderId# and COMPANY_ID = #comId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( select create_id from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like #folderPath# || '%' and tenant_id = #tenantId# AND USE_STATUS = 'Y' GROUP BY create_id ) ) = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( select create_id from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like #folderPath# || '%' and tenant_id = #tenantId# AND USE_STATUS = 'Y' GROUP BY create_id ) WHERE CREATE_ID = #userId# ) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS RESULT FROM DUAL

SELECT CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( select f.create_id from tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select folder_id from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like #folderPath# || '%' and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) t on f.folder_id = t.folder_id WHERE F.USE_STATUS = 'Y' group by create_id ) ) = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( select f.create_id from tbl_webfolder_file f inner join ( select folder_id from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like #folderPath# || '%' and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) t on f.folder_id = t.folder_id WHERE F.USE_STATUS = 'Y' group by create_id ) WHERE CREATE_ID = #userId# ) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS RESULT FROM DUAL
sqlMap.update: update tbl_webfolder_folder set UPDATE_DATE = TO_DATE(#timeUTC#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), USE_STATUS = 'T' , DELETER_ID = #userId# where TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and FOLDER_ID = #folderId#

update tbl_webfolder_folder set UPDATE_DATE = TO_DATE(#timeUTC#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), USE_STATUS = 'N' , DELETER_ID = #userId# where USE_STATUS = 'Y' and TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and FOLDER_ID != #folderId# and FOLDER_PATH like ( select path from ( select (df.folder_path ||'%') as path from tbl_webfolder_folder df where df.folder_id = #folderId# and df.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and df.company_id = #comId#) )

update tbl_webfolder_file set UPDATE_DATE = TO_DATE(#timeUTC#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), USE_STATUS = 'N', DELETER_ID = #userId# where TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and USE_STATUS = 'Y' and FOLDER_ID in ( select folder.folder_id
from tbl_webfolder_folder folder where folder.folder_path like ('%|' || #folderId# || '|%') and folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id = #comId# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL((SELECT ENV_VALUE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENV WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ENV_TYPE='P') , 10) AS CNNT FROM DUAL
sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENV TRG USING ( SELECT #userId# CN, 'P' ENV_TYPE, #tenantId# TENANT_ID FROM DUAL ) SRC ON (TRG.CN = SRC.CN AND TRG.ENV_TYPE = SRC.ENV_TYPE AND TRG.TENANT_ID = SRC.TENANT_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ENV_VALUE = #listCount# WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CN, ENV_TYPE, ENV_VALUE, TENANT_ID) VALUES(SRC.CN, SRC.ENV_TYPE, #listCount#, SRC.TENANT_ID)
sqlMap.select: SELECT fld.* FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER fld inner join TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f ON f.folder_id = fld.folder_id and f.tenant_id = fld.tenant_id WHERE f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and f.FILE_ID = #fileId#

SELECT DISTINCT f.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID , f.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME , f.FILE_PATH AS FILE_PATH , f.FILE_SIZE AS FILE_SIZE , f.TYPE_ID AS TYPE_ID , f.DOWN_COUNT AS DOWN_COUNT , f.FILE_EXT AS FILE_EXT , f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID , f.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS , f.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID , decode(#primary#, '1' , f.CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2) as CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2 as CREATE_NAME2, (f.CREATE_DATE + #offset#/(24*60)) AS CREATE_DATE, f.UPDATE_ID as UPDATE_ID, (f.UPDATE_DATE + #offset#/(24*60)) AS UPDATE_DATE, f.TENANT_ID as TENANT_ID, '' as TYPE_ICON , folder.FOLDER_PATH as FOLDER_PATH, folder.FOLDER_NAME1 as FOLDER_NAME1, '' AS FAVORITE_STATUS, '' AS FILESHARE_STATUS, decode(f.FILE_EXT, 'folder',0,1) as FOLDER_SORT, ft.TYPE_NAME AS TYPE_NAME, f.CREATE_ID AS OWNER_ID, 0 AS ENCRYPTED, f.DEPTH, f.ROOT_ID, f.PARENT_ID, f.HIERARCHICAL_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder on folder.FOLDER_ID = f.FOLDER_ID and f.TENANT_ID = folder.TENANT_ID left outer join tbl_webfolder_filetype ft on ft.file_ext = LOWER(f.file_ext) WHERE f.FILE_ID = #fldFileId# AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT DISTINCT folder.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID , folder.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME , folder.FOLDER_PATH AS FILE_PATH , 0 AS FILE_SIZE , 'folder' AS TYPE_ID , 0 AS DOWN_COUNT , 'folder' AS FILE_EXT , folder.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID , folder.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS , folder.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID , decode( #primary#, '1' , folder.CREATE_NAME1, folder.CREATE_NAME2) as CREATE_NAME1, folder.CREATE_NAME2 as CREATE_NAME2, (folder.CREATE_DATE + #offset#/(24*60)) AS CREATE_DATE, folder.UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, (folder.UPDATE_DATE + #offset#/(24*60)) AS UPDATE_DATE, folder.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID , '' as TYPE_ICON , folder.FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH , folder.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1 , '' AS FAVORITE_STATUS, '' AS FILESHARE_STATUS, decode(type.FILE_EXT, 'folder',0,1) as FOLDER_SORT, '' AS TYPE_NAME, folder.OWNER_ID AS OWNER_ID, 0 AS ENCRYPTED, 1 AS DEPTH, TO_CHAR(folder.FOLDER_ID) AS ROOT_ID, TO_CHAR(folder.FOLDER_ID) AS PARENT_ID, TO_CHAR(folder.FOLDER_ID) AS HIERARCHICAL_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_filetype type on 'folder' = type.FILE_EXT and folder.TENANT_ID = type.TENANT_ID WHERE folder.FOLDER_ID = #fldFileId# and folder.TENANT_ID =#tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET FILE_PATH = #filePath#, UPDATE_DATE = TO_DATE(#timeUTC#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), UPDATE_ID = #userId#, FILE_SIZE = #fileSize#, FILE_NAME = #fileName# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_TOKEN (USERID, LTOKEN, REGDATA, TENANTID, DEVICE) VALUES (#userId#, #token#, SYSTIMESTAMP, #tenantId#, #device#)
SELECT LTOKEN FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_TOKEN WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_TOKEN WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(USERID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_TOKEN WHERE USERID = #userId# AND LTOKEN = #token# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#
SELECT COUNT(USERID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_TOKEN WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#
SELECT FOLDER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND OWNER_ID = #ownerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType#

SELECT FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FILE_ID IN
#fileList[]#
SELECT DISTINCT(user_id) FROM tbl_webfolder_folderuser WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND user_type = 'GROUP'

SELECT TO_CHAR(extensionattribute7) FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# UNION SELECT TO_CHAR(extensionattribute8) FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# UNION SELECT jobid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
select * from tbl_webfolder_file where file_id = #fileId# and use_status != 'T' and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select.isNotEqual:
SELECT distinct folder.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID,
folder.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME,
folder.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME,
folder.folder_type AS FOLDER_TYPE, folder.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder
LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER fuser ON fuser.FOLDER_ID = folder.FOLDER_ID WHERE (( folder.FOLDER_LEVEL = 1 AND fuser.USER_ID IN
#idList[]# ) or (folder.FOLDER_LEVEL= 0 AND folder.OWNER_ID = #companyId#))
WHERE folder.FOLDER_LEVEL = 0
AND folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# AND folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND folder.OWNER_ID IN
#idList[]#
AND folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_NAME
select.isEqual:
SELECT distinct FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID,
D2.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME,
D2.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME,
D2.folder_type AS FOLDER_TYPE, D2.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D2 JOIN ( SELECT D.FOLDER_PATH, SD.SHARE_ID AS NUM FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT S.FOLDERFILE_ID, S.SHARE_ID, S.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE S JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB SS ON S.SHARE_ID = SS.SHARE_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = SS.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE SH ON S.SHARE_ID = SH.SHARE_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = SH.TENANT_ID AND SH.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE SS.USER_ID IN
#idList[]#
AND S. FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'D' AND SH.USER_ID IS NULL ) SD ON D.FOLDER_ID = SD.FOLDERFILE_ID AND D.TENANT_ID = SD.TENANT_ID WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) FP ON D2.FOLDER_PATH LIKE (FP.FOLDER_PATH) AND D2.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# WHERE D2.USE_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY FOLDER_NAME
